programs.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programs.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal that Nazis got closer to America than ever believed; using the latest cutting-edge underwater technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programs.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programs.desc: New discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts investigate a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.

programs.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programs.desc: A cutting edge investigation into an deep-sea graveyard of 25 shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history, and using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long lost battleships.

programs.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programs.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programs.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programs.desc: A once lavish destination in the mountains of Romania is now in disrepair and mysteriously deserted; experts investigate these sprawling ruins and uncover the remains of a luxurious resort caught in a web of corruption.

programs.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programs.desc: The bizarre remnants of a housing complex lie mysteriously deserted in an Ohio industrial town; experts investigate and uncover the dark, turbulent past of an oppressive steel company and labor strikes that resulted in deadly riots.
